view.params:
SELECT gcgm.gcgm,gcgm.SID
FROM gcgm
ORDER BY gcgm.SID ASC

SELECT ypqy.SID,ypqy.cfqy
FROM ypqy
WHERE   (ypqy.cfdd=[产品资料.存放地点])
ORDER BY ypqy.SID ASC

SELECT yfhssheet.fhdd
FROM yfhs,yfhssheet
WHERE   (yfhssheet.bknr="运费核算") group by yfhssheet.fhdd
ORDER BY yfhssheet.fhdd ASC

SELECT cymxsheet.wxht
FROM cymx,cymxsheet
WHERE   ((cymx.SID=cymxsheet.PID)
   AND  (cymx.fphm=[代理收汇.详细用途.发票号码])) group by cymxsheet.wxht
ORDER BY cymxsheet.wxht ASC

SELECT cnshengf.SID,cnshengf.ywmc
FROM cnshengf
WHERE   (cnshengf.zwmc=:zwmc)
ORDER BY cnshengf.SID ASC

SELECT wfgs.SID,wfgs.wfgs
FROM wfgs
ORDER BY wfgs.SID ASC

SELECT kpnr.tjhl
FROM kpnr where kpnr.tjhl>0
ORDER BY kpnr.SID ASC

SELECT huoguixh.mc,huoguixh.SID
FROM huoguixh
ORDER BY huoguixh.SID ASC

SELECT fkkh.SID,fkkh.khmc,fkkh.xbdm
FROM fkkh where (fkkh.xbdm<>"") and (fkkh.xbdm is not null)
ORDER BY fkkh.SID ASC

SELECT hbdm.hbdm,hbdm.SID
FROM hbdm
ORDER BY hbdm.SID ASC
